primitives.name: groundwork
primitives.description: Scaffold a research → design → plan → orchestrate → act folder for non-trivial work; drops a domain-agnostic spine plus stateless action-skills.

primitives.name: ikenga-artifact-builder
primitives.description: Author a self-contained interactive HTML artifact that renders standalone and lights up with live data inside the Ikenga shell.

primitives.name: design-language
primitives.description: Discover and apply a project's existing visual identity — token packages, tailwind/shadcn vars, theme files — into a JSON design contract for downstream artifact skills.

primitives.name: huashu-design
primitives.description: 花叔Design — hi-fi HTML prototypes, interactive demos, slides, animations, and design-direction advisory; embody UX/animation/prototype experts and avoid AI-slop.

primitives.name: scrollytelling
primitives.description: Scroll-driven storytelling — pinned sections, progressive reveals, parallax, and scroll-linked animations for narrative landing pages.

primitives.name: impeccable
primitives.description: Design, critique, and polish frontend interfaces — visual hierarchy, information architecture, accessibility, theming, motion, micro-interactions, and anti-patterns.

primitives.name: subagent-model-floor
primitives.description: PreToolUse hook that auto-assigns a model to spawned subagents by task weight (haiku / sonnet / opus) when no model is set — a floor so Agent/Task calls don't silently inherit Opus.
